# Plubis

> AI-generated picture books for children facing specific emotional situations. A book for the hard things to explain.

## What this site does

Plubis makes personalized illustrated picture books for kids ages 2-6 going through hard moments — new sibling, divorce, grief, nightmares, first day of school, big feelings, and more. Parents pick the situation, enter their child's name, and get a custom illustrated book in about 5 minutes. The first book is free.

The books are "conversation books" — designed to help parents talk to their children about specific emotional situations using age-appropriate story framing. Not therapy. Not medical advice. Conversation starters.

## Pricing

- 1 book: $5
- 3 books: $12 (save 20%)
- 10 books: $35 (save 30%)
- First book: free on signup

## Key pages

- / — Landing page (product overview, how it works, pricing)
- /about — What Plubis is and isn't, how books get made, category positioning
- /pricing — Credit pack tiers
- /blog — Index of 125 picture-book recommendation guides (5 ages × 25 situations)
- /new — Book creation form (requires sign-in)

## Blog content structure

125 articles at /blog/{slug}. Each one:
- Targets a specific age (2, 3, 4, 5, or 6) and emotional situation
- Recommends 5-8 real, published picture books with author names
- Includes age-appropriate reading advice
- Written in honest, parent-to-parent voice
- Ends with a Plubis CTA for custom book creation

Slug pattern: picture-books-for-{age}-year-old-about-{situation}

## Situations covered (25 total)

new-sibling, first-day-school, grief-pet, grief-grandparent, divorce, moving, nightmares, doctor-visit, dentist-visit, potty-regression, parent-travel, deployment, big-feelings, tantrums, new-pet, lost-friend, new-school, new-language, parent-illness, bedtime, sharing, making-friends, confidence, picky-eating, independence

## Example article URLs

- /blog/picture-books-for-3-year-old-about-new-sibling
- /blog/picture-books-for-4-year-old-about-divorce
- /blog/picture-books-for-5-year-old-about-grief-pet
- /blog/picture-books-for-2-year-old-about-nightmares
- /blog/picture-books-for-6-year-old-about-big-feelings

## Tech stack

Next.js, Firebase, Anthropic Claude (Managed Agents), Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux Schnell for illustrations)

## Contact

hello@example.com
